title: Old World Villagers
body:
![Old World Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c05d92a7282825f9ccdf8408647a230992a5722f.png)
**OPTIFINE or ETF + EMF REQUIRED**

This resource pack changes Villagers into various types of Monkeys/apes/primates.

The current changes are visible in the Gallery.
